components.value: V, S, M (a flask of unholy water or 5 pounds of powdered silver worth 25 gp)

description.value: This spell functions as holy ice, except it is made of frozen unholy water rather than holy water. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game: Ultimate Magic.
